lab.tagline: Early diagnosis and intervention of Alzheimer's disease and vascular cognitive impairment
lab.intro: Yi Tang's laboratory focuses on understanding the complex nature of Alzheimer's disease (AD) and vascular cognitive impairment (VCI). Our research integrates molecular biology, biochemistry, bioinformatics, electrophysiology, and behavioral analysis to uncover disease mechanisms and to develop strategies for early diagnosis and intervention.
lab.affiliation: Department of Neurology, Xuanwu Hospital, Capital Medical University, Beijing, China

pi.name: Yi Tang, MD, PhD
pi.title: Chief Neurologist, Professor in Neurology
pi.affiliation: Department of Neurology, Xuanwu Hospital, Capital Medical University, Beijing, China
pi.bio: Prof. Yi Tang received his Ph.D. and M.D. from Peking Union Medical College and conducted postdoctoral research at Cornell University Medical College. He is now the Executive Vice Dean of Xuanwu Hospital, Capital Medical University. Prof. Tang is dedicated to advancing research on Alzheimer's disease and related cognitive disorders, focusing on their pathogenesis and early intervention strategies.
